name: Red Shoes
overview: The series revolves around Kim Jem Ma, a daughter who has strong desire to take revenge from her heartless mother, who left her father and sick brother in search of love and desire for her success.

trailers.title: [티저] 빨강 구두 첫 번째 티저, 난 나만을 위한 삶을 살고 싶었어...난 무죄야! [빨강 구두] | KBS 방송
